channel.title: 🎓 Philosophy on Jonas B. Skånøy
channel.description: Recent content in 🎓 Philosophy on Jonas B. Skånøy

item.title: Problems Regarding Political Debates in this Day and Age.
item.description: In this blog post, I want to put out thoughts on the topic of truth. More specifically, I want to look at how the modern understanding of truth as a rhetorical tool, rather than something that is practical in our everyday life. My motivation for writing this to get my thought out on paper, as well as to express my disagreements with Ben Shapiro and Jordan Peterson on this specific topic.

item.title: Book review: Twilight of the Idols
item.description: In this post, I’ll review Nietzsche’s famous work Götzen-Dämmerung, better known as “Twilight of the Idols”. I will try, to the best of my abilities, bringing something forth the chapters I found most fruitful and thought-provoking. So, without further ado, let’s begin! Quick disclosure This work might be one Nietzsche’s least nuanced work, and a lot of the stands he makes in it is a result of his declining health.
